name: Relatively Nat & Liv
overview: Natalie Halcro and Olivia Pierson, sexy, enticing, and scorching hot cousins juggle with their lives between L.A. and their humble roots in Vancouver while the gorgeous beauties look toward curating their first fashion line.

trailers.title: New Series "Relatively Nat & Liv" Comes to E! on June 2 | E!
